---
title: Azure Migrate Dependency Discovery (Reserved Slot) â€” Adapter Technical Specification
doc-type: ats
adapter-id: azure-migrate
adapter-class: conformance
mission-class: telemetry
status: reserved
phase: phase-planning
gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate
canon-source: src/uiao/canon/adapter-registry.yaml
derived-from: uiao/canon (sync_canon.py)
generated: '2026-05-07'
---

# Azure Migrate Dependency Discovery (Reserved Slot) â€” Adapter Technical Specification

::: {.callout-note}
## Canon-derived document

**Status:** `reserved` Â· **Class:** `conformance` Â· **Mission:** `telemetry` Â· **Phase:** `phase-planning`

**Canon source:** `canon/adapter-registry.yaml` (propagated by `uiao/tools/sync_canon.py`).

The YAML frontmatter and this banner are regenerated from canon on every sync. **Do not hand-edit.** Author new material only below the `## Overview` heading.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
## Scaffold â€” awaiting authored content

This document is a stub. Replace every `_TODO â€” ..._` block with authored content that is consistent with UIAO canon. Canon invariants (`gcc-boundary`, `ssot-mutation: never`, etc.) must never be contradicted.
:::

## Overview

_TODO â€” Author an overview of the Azure Migrate Dependency Discovery (Reserved Slot) adapter's role in the UIAO governance perimeter. Do not contradict canon. Cross-reference the companion AVS document where relevant._

## Scope

Target surfaces / subsystems: `server-dependency-inventory`, `port-and-protocol-discovery`, `service-call-mapping`, `application-discovery`

_TODO â€” Expand scope with concrete boundaries: what the adapter reads, what it emits, what it explicitly does not touch._

## Controls

NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 controls this adapter supports: `CM-8`, `CA-7`, `SC-7`

_TODO â€” For each control, state the adapter's role (primary, supporting, evidence-only). If a control is aspirational, flag as `NEW (Proposed)` per No-Hallucination Protocol._

## Operational profile

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Runtime | `TBD` |
| Runtime pin | `TBD` |
| Runner class | `TBD` |
| Tenancy | `per-customer` |
| Evidence class | `baseline` |
| Retention | `3` year(s) |

## Canon invariants

- `gcc-boundary: gcc-moderate`
- `ssot-mutation: never`
- `certificate-anchored: true`
- `object-identity-only: true`

## Notes from canon

Reserved slot per ADR-049. Read-only discovery feed for server-to-server dependencies, port/protocol mapping, and service-call graphs. Primary native input for OrgPath server- plane edges (per UIAO_007 OrgPath ingestion contract). Critical for deterministic domain-retirement sequencing â€” the cross-server dependency graph that Microsoft does not provide via any other surface.

## References

- UIAO-CANON-003
- ADR-049

---

*Generated by `uiao/tools/sync_canon.py`. See `uiao/ARCHITECTURE.md` Â§4 for the cross-repo sync contract. See `uiao-docs/_quarto.yml` for rendering configuration.*
